name: Emotet Process Creation Detected
description: Detects process executions with command-line patterns commonly associated with the Emotet malware, specifically those not covered by more generic detection rules. This rule identifies specific obfuscated or unusual command-line arguments used by Emotet to evade traditional detection methods.

prompts.prompt: Emotet malware process creation detected with suspicious and obfuscated command-line arguments. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {user}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **Command** {command}. Investigate this high-risk activity immediately for signs of Emotet infection.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Process Creation (e.g., 1).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line of the process, containing suspicious patterns.
